title: ferocactus gracilis subsp. tortulispinus
intro: Ferocactus gracilis subsp. tortulispinus, also known as the twisted-spined barrel cactus, is a species of cactus native to Mexico. This plant is known to have medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of alkaloids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ferocactus gracilis subsp. tortulispinus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and provide antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's stem is typically dried and ground into a powder, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
